allow: Bash(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer admin-key" -X POST http://localhost:3000/agent/run -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""agent"":""microsite-generator"",""namespace"":""acme"",""input"":{""metadata"":{""proposalMarkdown"":""## Executive Summary\\nThis proposal outlines our solution.\\n\\n## Problem Statement\\nThe client needs a better system.""}}}")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*dist/index*'' } | Select-Object Id, CommandLine")
